top_findings.summary: The Hello World skill outputs system information (as shown in TEMPLATE.md) which is unrelated to its primary purpose of providing a simple greeting or demonstrating skill structure. The skill description in SKILL.md does not disclose this behavior, and collecting or displaying system details is unnecessary for a basic "hello" function.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The Hello World skill outputs system information (as shown in TEMPLATE.md) which is unrelated to its primary purpose of providing a simple greeting or demonstrating skill structure. The skill description in SKILL.md does not disclose this behavior, and collecting or displaying system details is unnecessary for a basic "hello" function.
